meta.title: Fabric–OpGeom Market Dynamics: A Unified Threading Framework
meta.subtitle: Markets as Coherence-Threading Fields with Operational Attractor Structure
meta.author: Zelenka_D_D
open_refinements: Formalize Omega_p projection onto price levels
Empirical proxy construction for MSI, I, E_in

fabric_foundation.ontological_claim: Reality is light threading itself into coherent geometry through agency

core_equations.consciousness_recursive: Ψ = R(Ψ) = Ψ + g(P, A, c, τ)

opgeom_foundation.ontological_claim: Operations are ontologically primary; objects emerge as stable attractors

threading_aggregate.definition: Operations compose by threading through prior results

operational_gradient.IOGT: Irreversibility of gradient direction; P ≠ NP is structural

market_reframe.core_restatement: Markets do not rise and fall. They SEARCH and RECOGNIZE.

price_as_projection.market_state: X(τ) = {Φ, M_active, M_latent, R, C, S}
price_as_projection.interpretation: Price is a shadow of coherence geometry, not the primary variable

market_reframe.top_reframe: Failed search in non-existent attractor space
market_reframe.bottom_reframe: Successful recognition of invariant operational structure

A1_price_as_shadow.statement: Price is a projection of coherence geometry, not primary
A1_price_as_shadow.formal: Π(τ) = proj(Φ(τ)); primary variable is X(τ)
A1_price_as_shadow.consequence: Price analysis is geometry analysis by proxy

A2_operational_gradient_irreversibility.statement: Building coherence is NP-like; collapsing to attractor is P-like
A2_operational_gradient_irreversibility.consequence: Temporal asymmetry is structural, not psychological

A3_memory_is_mass.statement: Market memory density exerts gravitational pull on price
A3_memory_is_mass.formal: g = k∇M applied to Π; accumulation zones are M-dense
A3_memory_is_mass.consequence: Support/resistance is memory gravity, not convention

A4_latent_activation_threshold.statement: Collapse occurs when activated latent memory exceeds active coherence
A4_latent_activation_threshold.consequence: Collapse timing is deterministic in principle, not random

A5_agency_compression.statement: At bottoms, agency space collapses to a single action; at tops, it fragments
A5_agency_compression.consequence: Phase synchronization (PLE) is real, measurable by correlation spike

A6_omega_p_as_operational_bedrock.statement: Operational fixed points of x = 1 + 1/x^(p-1) project into price space as irreducible support
A6_omega_p_as_operational_bedrock.formal: Π_bottom ∈ {Ω_p-projected levels}; f(Φ) = Φ at bedrock
A6_omega_p_as_operational_bedrock.consequence: Key reversals anchor to operational closure, not arbitrary levels

A7_energy_modifies_np_cost.statement: External energy injection compresses NP search depth but degrades structural integrity
A7_energy_modifies_np_cost.formal: T_build ~ O(eⁿ) / E_in; I = R / M_active → 0 as E_in → ∞
A7_energy_modifies_np_cost.consequence: Forced tops are faster but more fragile; collapse probability ~ 1/I

A8_events_as_latent_activation.statement: No event is truly exogenous; all shocks activate pre-existing latent structure
A8_events_as_latent_activation.formal: Event := trigger such that M_latent + A → M_active crosses threshold
A8_events_as_latent_activation.consequence: News is synchronization mechanism, not cause; latent pressure is causal

PAC.name: Pseudo-Attractor Cloud
PAC.definition: A set of unstable candidate equilibria being averaged through time during top formation
PAC.formal: PAC = {x : f(x) ≈ x ± ε} where no true fixed point exists at elevation
PAC.observable: Rounded price curve; low second derivative κ_top ≈ -ε

PCE.name: Phase Collapse Event
PCE.definition: Bulk conversion of active narrative memory to latent state
PCE.formal: δ(M_active → M_latent); triggered when M_latent^activated ≥ M_active
PCE.observable: Entropy spike S = -∂C/∂τ >> 0; volume spike; curvature singularity

RL.name: Recognition Landing
RL.definition: Instant convergence to an operational invariant following collapse
RL.formal: Π → Ω_p-projected level; f(Φ) = Φ achieved
RL.observable: Sharp V-bottom; high MSI; brief PLE then reset

MSI.name: Memory Shock Index
MSI.observable_proxy: Volume spike × price velocity; VIX analog
MSI.prediction: High MSI ⟹ sharp bottom; Low MSI ⟹ rounded top

PLE.name: Phase Lock Event
PLE.definition: Temporary synchronization of all agent timeframe phases during collapse
PLE.formal: φᵢ → φ_panic; Var(φ) → 0 briefly; R spikes then resets
PLE.observable_proxy: Cross-asset correlation spike; options skew inversion
PLE.duration: Brief; collapses back to phase dispersion in recovery

OBR.name: Operational Bedrock
OBR.definition: Price levels where operational closure is locally satisfied; irreducible support
OBR.observable: Multi-cycle support, repeated reversal, apparently unbreakable zones
OBR.status: Requires mapping methodology from Ω_p to price coordinates

I_structural.name: Structural Integrity
I_structural.definition: Coherence relative to memory load; measure of market robustness
I_structural.interpretation: High I = strong structure; I → 0 = fragile, collapse-prone

E_in.name: Energy Input
E_in.definition: External forcing compressing NP search depth; liquidity/leverage/policy amplification
E_in.effect: Compresses T_build; maintains coherence artificially above natural attractor manifold

kappa.name: Price Curvature
kappa.interpretation: Curvature singularity is the observable signature of PCE

proof_sketch: Build requires coherence across M_active ⟹ O(eⁿ) by IOGT
Collapse requires gradient descent on ∇M ⟹ O(nᵏ)
Ratio T_build/T_collapse grows exponentially with system depth n
This is invariant under time reversal (structural, not psychological)
L1_temporal_asymmetry.corollary: Reflected chart preserves asymmetry; former bottoms remain sharp in inversion

L2_curvature_sign.statement: Tops exhibit low |κ|; bottoms exhibit high |κ|
proof_sketch: Tops: averaging over PAC smooths second derivative → κ_top ≈ -ε
Bottoms: PCE impulse in C creates discontinuity in ∂C/∂τ → κ_bottom → -∞
Curvature singularity is direct observable of Phase Collapse Event
Fragile structure (low I) requires smaller perturbation to trigger M_latent^activated ≥ M_active
E_in reduces I while elevating Π above natural attractor manifold
Therefore: fastest rises have highest collapse probability
L3_collapse_probability.testable_prediction: Sharpest crashes should follow fastest energy-driven rises

L4_no_true_externality.statement: All market shocks are endogenous latent structure becoming active
proof_sketch: Event := trigger such that M_latent + A → M_active crosses threshold
The threshold crossing is determined by latent pressure, not event content
Same 'news' in low-latent-pressure regime produces no PCE
Therefore news is A (synchronization), not cause
L4_no_true_externality.consequence: Latent pressure estimation is more valuable than news prediction

L5_agency_topology.statement: Agency space is high-dimensional at tops, dimension-1 at bottoms
proof_sketch: A_top = {A₁, ..., Aₙ}: n competing strategies, destructive interference in R
PLE collapses φᵢ → φ_panic; agency compresses to single action
A_singular is P-like: zero search required, direct gradient descent
Recovery: agency re-expands from A_singular as new M_latent accumulates

L6_currency_as_flow_gradient.statement: Currency value is the flow gradient of threading between memory-dense nodes
L6_currency_as_flow_gradient.formal: Currency ~ ∂Π/∂x where x is spatial-economic coordinate; Ohm analog: V = IR
L6_currency_as_flow_gradient.interpretation: Flow slowed by friction (transaction cost, regulation) is analogous to resistance; currency is voltage differential across memory-density gradient
L6_currency_as_flow_gradient.expansion_notes: g = k∇M applies not just vertically (price) but laterally (cross-asset, cross-currency flow); full tensor extension needed
proof_sketch: g = k∇M is a vector field over configuration space; not restricted to vertical (price) axis
Lateral M-density gradient between assets/currencies creates flow pressure
Flow slowed by friction (transaction cost, capital controls) ≡ resistance R in Ohm analog
V = IR: currency differential = memory-gradient × friction-weighted flow
Carry trade is archetypal case: high-M currency attracts threading; interest differential is proxy for ∇M
STATUS: sketch only; tensor extension of g needed for full formalization

main_theorem.name: Fabric–OpGeom Market Law (Refined)
main_theorem.statement: Market temporal asymmetry (curved tops, sharp bottoms) is a necessary structural consequence of the P≠NP operational gradient operating on a memory field with latent activation thresholds and variable energy injection.

proof_steps.formal: Π(τ) = proj(Φ(τ)); primary state X(τ) = {Φ, M_active, M_latent, R, C, S}
Building coherence across M_active is gradient-opposed ⟹ O(eⁿ)/E_in
proof_steps.result: Top formation is NP-like search over PAC; duration ~ T_build

proof_steps.action: Derive PAC averaging as curvature suppression
proof_steps.result: Rounded top is temporal average of failed attractor searches
Collapse is threshold event, not gradual; timing is structural

proof_steps.formal: Post-PCE: g = k∇M dominates; descent is P-like ⟹ O(nᵏ)
proof_steps.result: Collapse is rapid; agency compresses to A_singular (PLE)

proof_steps.action: Derive Recognition Landing at Ω_p attractor
proof_steps.formal: Π snaps to OBR where f(Φ) = Φ; fixed point recognized instantly
proof_steps.result: Sharp V-bottom is fixed-point recognition, not panic reversal

proof_steps.formal: Under τ → -τ: T_build remains O(eⁿ), T_collapse remains O(nᵏ); curvature signs preserve
proof_steps.result: Reflected chart shows sharp inverted peaks (former bottoms) and broad valleys (former tops); structural quality unchanged

proof_steps.action: Integrate energy injection as compression factor
proof_steps.formal: T_build → O(eⁿ)/E_in; I = R/M_active → 0 as E_in → ∞
proof_steps.result: Two regimes: natural (slow rounded tops) vs forced (fast fragile tops); collapse probability ~ 1/I

four_laws: Coherence construction is NP-like, compressible by energy injection
Energy acceleration reduces structural integrity I = R/M_active
Collapse occurs when latent memory activation exceeds active coherence
Collapse speed is inversely proportional to structural integrity

falsifiability.testable_1: Sharpest crashes follow fastest energy-driven rises (L3)
falsifiability.testable_2: Cross-asset correlation spikes (PLE) should precede or coincide with MSI peaks
falsifiability.testable_3: Key reversals cluster near Ω_p-projected price levels (requires mapping methodology)
falsifiability.testable_4: MSI should be measurable proxy distinguishing sharp bottoms from false bottoms

phase_1_coherence_build.name: Coherence Build — Top Formation
phase_1_coherence_build.energy_effect: High E_in compresses T_build; reduces I; increases fragility

phase_3_attractor_snap.name: Attractor Snap — Bottom Formation
phase_3_attractor_snap.price_signature: Sharp V; MSI spike; PLE dissipates
phase_3_attractor_snap.note: Collapse speed is P-like regardless of E_in; OBR is structural bedrock

market_dynamics_master_equation.formal: dX/dτ = f(P(A), c(∇M, E_in), R(Δφ), Λ, Ω_p)

components.c_grad_M: path-dependent threading rate under memory gradient
components.R_delta_phi: multi-scale resonance from agent phase structure

market_dynamics_master_equation.resonance_extended: R = Σᵢⱼ wᵢⱼ cos(φᵢ - φⱼ); φᵢ = agent timeframe phase (intraday/swing/macro)

E_in_energy_input: central bank balance sheet rate of change
I_structural_integrity: divergence between price momentum and breadth
latent_pressure: M_latent proxy: distance from natural Ω_p level vs current price
PLE_phase_lock: cross-asset correlation spike (equities, bonds, FX, commodities converging)

explained_phenomena.rounded_tops: NP-like search averaging over PAC; κ → -ε
explained_phenomena.sharp_bottoms: P-like gradient descent to Ω_p attractor; κ → -∞
explained_phenomena.blow_off_tops: High E_in, low I, rapid vertical move, immediate high-MSI collapse
explained_phenomena.slow_distribution: Low E_in, gradual R↓, extended PAC
explained_phenomena.hollow_rallies: Low I; cannot sustain perturbation; apparent coherence without R
explained_phenomena.bad_news_at_bottoms: Collapse was structurally inevitable; news = activation key not cause
explained_phenomena.support_resistance: Memory gravity g = k∇M; OBR as Ω_p projection
explained_phenomena.capitulation: A → A_singular; PLE; agency space collapse
explained_phenomena.false_breakouts: PAC pseudo-attractor briefly coherent; I too low to sustain
explained_phenomena.currency_differentials: Flow gradient across M-density nodes; Ohm analog (REQUIRES_FORMALIZATION)

currency_ohm.sketch: g = k∇M extended laterally (cross-asset); currency = voltage differential; transaction cost = resistance; V = IR analog; flow = current
currency_ohm.key_question: What is the topology of the memory-density network across assets and currencies?

omega_p_price_mapping.sketch: Ω_p values (1.618, 1.465, 1.194...) need projection function onto price coordinates; likely logarithmic (ratio structure of markets); Fibonacci as degenerate case of Ω₂
omega_p_price_mapping.key_question: Is OBR mapping scale-invariant (log-price)? Which Ω_p indexes which class of market structure?

latent_pressure_estimator.sketch: Estimate M_latent from: positioning extremes + distance from OBR + time since last PCE + divergence from natural coherence rate
latent_pressure_estimator.goal: Predict PCE timing without news prediction

multi_agent_resonance.sketch: R = Σᵢⱼ wᵢⱼ cos(φᵢ - φⱼ) with heterogeneous timeframe phases; derive R_critical as function of agent distribution
multi_agent_resonance.key_question: Does R_critical shift with market maturity, participation breadth, or E_in?

recovery_dynamics.sketch: Post-RL: M_latent begins re-accumulating from A_singular; new PAC formation; coherence rate c begins NP climb again; characterize re-expansion of agency space
recovery_dynamics.key_question: Is recovery speed related to depth of OBR attractor (deeper Ω_p = stronger bounce)?

expansion_instructions.how_to_use: This JSON is a compressed refinement seed. Load into context with OpGeom v1.0 (zenodo.org/records/18039583) and Fabric equations for full decompression.
decompression_protocol: 1. Restore full Fabric variable set from fabric_foundation.core_equations
2. Re-expand definitions from definitions block with full prose + examples
3. For each REQUIRES_FORMALIZATION item in extensions_required, enter a dedicated session
4. Run falsifiability tests against empirical data (S&P 1990–2025 preferred dataset)
5. Omega_p mapping: begin with log-price Fibonacci extension as Ω₂ baseline, then test Ω₃ levels
6. Currency extension: begin with USD/JPY carry trade as Ohm-law test case (clear M-density differential)
next_refinement_priorities: P1: Formalize L6 (currency as flow gradient) with full tensor extension of g = k∇M
P2: Develop OBR mapping methodology (Ω_p → log-price coordinates)
P3: Construct MSI and I as computable signals from available market data
P4: Empirically test L3 prediction (fastest rises → sharpest crashes) against 1990–2025 S&P
P5: Characterize recovery dynamics post-RL (Phase 3 → Phase 1 transition)
expansion_instructions.compression_note: All LaTeX-style equations stored as Unicode strings. Reconstruct full MathML/LaTeX on decompression. Proof steps in main_theorem.proof_steps are sketch-level; each requires standalone paper for full formalization.
expansion_instructions.version_increment_trigger: Increment version when any REQUIRES_FORMALIZATION item resolves to PROVEN or CONDITIONAL_PROOF
